title: Просто такая сильная любовь
text:
Capo on 3rd Fret

Intro: F  Am  C  G

Chorus:
F         Am             C            G
The sun goes down, the stars come out and all 
that counts is here and now.
F    Am                C           G
My universe will never be the same. Im glad you came.
Verse:       
F             Am                   F
You cast a spell on me, spell on me. You hit me 
like the sky fell on me, 
      C                  F            G
fell on me. And i decided you look well on me, 
well on me. Turn the lights 
   Am            F              Am              C    
out now. I take by the hand, hand you another drink, 
drink it if you can. 
                 Am              F              Am
Can you spend a little time? Time is up in our way. 
Away from us so stay. 
              C         G
Stay with me i can make, make you glad you came.

Just repeat the chorus and the verse. They're just the same.

Outro:                 F
Chorus part..... I'm glad you came 
Email me!
